platforms.title: Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
platforms.description: Mulai dari sini · paling direkomendasikan untuk pemula cloud engineer

phases.title: Fondasi Wajib
phases.meta: Minggu 1–2 · Jangan diskip ini!

courses.name: Intro to Cloud Computing
courses.desc: Konsep dasar cloud computing - AWS, Azure, GCP overview. Mulai banget dari sini.

courses.name: Learn Python 3
courses.desc:
Bahasa wajib untuk automation & scripting di cloud. Hampir semua cloud engineer
                pakai Python.

phases.title: Google Associate Cloud Engineer - Path Utama
phases.meta: Minggu 3–5 · Ambil path ini, otomatis dapat semua modul di bawah

courses.name: Google Associate Cloud Engineer (Path Utama)
courses.desc:
Certification path resmi Google. Covers GCP deployment, management, application
                operations dan cloud platform skills dengan hands-on experience. Includes 20 courses.

phases.title: 15 Modul ACE - Selesaikan Urut
phases.meta: Minggu 5–9 · Ini inti sertifikasi Google ACE

courses.name: Google ACE: Google Cloud Platform Ecosystem
courses.desc:
Virtual Machines, Kubernetes, Cloud Functions. Account setup, console navigation,
                billing & pricing.

courses.name: Google ACE: Configuring Google Cloud
courses.desc: Cloud Shell, database services, BigQuery untuk efficient development.

courses.name: Google ACE: Identity & Access Management (IAM)
courses.desc: Manage authorization dengan Google Cloud IAM. Custom roles dan IAM audit logs.

courses.name: Google ACE: Google Cloud Resource Manager
courses.desc: Hierarchically manage resources. Labels, tags, project migration, audit logs.

courses.name: Google ACE: Google Virtual Private Cloud (VPC)
courses.desc:
VPC networks dan subnets. Cloud VPN, Deployment Manager templates, subnet
                management.

courses.name: Google ACE: Implementing Google Compute Engine
courses.desc:
Create dan manage Virtual Machine instances, sole-tenant nodes, managed instance
                group.

courses.name: Google ACE: Managing Google Compute Engine
courses.desc:
Manage VM instances, OS inventory management, snapshots dan images, metadata
                server.

courses.name: Google ACE: Implementing Google Cloud Storage
courses.desc:
Object Lifecycle Management, storage buckets, storage classes, naming. Migrate
                database ke Cloud SQL.

courses.name: Google ACE: Managing Google Cloud Storage
courses.desc:
Cloud Storage buckets, BigQuery untuk estimasi storage, Dataproc untuk job
                status.

courses.name: Google ACE: Implementing Google Kubernetes Engine
courses.desc:
GKE clusters, security features, networking, monitoring dan logging untuk
                containerized apps.

courses.name: Google ACE: Managing Google Kubernetes Engine
courses.desc:
Cluster management, access control, volumes, secrets, ConfigMaps, StatefulSets,
                DaemonSets.

courses.name: Google ACE: Implementing Google App Engine
courses.desc:
Scalable hosting, gcloud deployment, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Pub/Sub
                notifications.

courses.name: Google ACE: Managing Google App Engine
courses.desc:
Traffic splitting, custom domains, SSL, app resources, scaling configurations,
                versioning.

courses.name: Google ACE: Google Cloud Operations Suite
courses.desc:
Cloud Monitoring, Cloud Logging, Cloud Trace, Cloud Debugger untuk app
                performance.

courses.name: Google ACE: Google Cloud Load Balancing
courses.desc:
Autoscaling, traffic distribution, access control, SSL dan TCP traffic
                distribution.

phases.title: Google Professional - Spesialisasi Lanjutan
phases.meta: Minggu 10–14 · Pilih salah satu sesuai arah karir

courses.name: Google Cloud Digital Leader
courses.desc:
Cloud concepts, GCP products, services dan business applications. Cocok kalau mau
                arah business/management.

courses.name: Google Professional Data Engineer
courses.desc:
Data pipelines, big data processing, GCP storage, analysis dan ML tools. Kalau
                mau ke data engineering.

courses.name: Google Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer
courses.desc:
CI/CD pipelines, configuration management, secrets, deployment pipeline security.
                Kalau mau ke DevOps.

courses.name: Google Professional Cloud Developer
courses.desc:
GCP application design, deployment, scalable development, cloud-native solutions.
                Kalau mau ke backend dev.

courses.name: Google Professional Cloud Architect
courses.desc:
Cloud architecture design, infrastructure management, scalable solution
                development. Level paling tinggi.

phases.title: GCP AI & Bonus (Opsional)
phases.meta: Kursus gratis bonus · bisa diambil kapan aja

courses.name: Generative AI on GCP: An Introduction
courses.desc: AI development di GCP, GCP advantages untuk ML, image generation, NLP.

courses.name: Generative AI on GCP: Deep Dive Into Generative AI Studio
courses.desc:
Language model training, tuning, performance evaluation, deployment,
                speech-to-text.

courses.name: Generative AI on GCP: Harnessing Generative AI with Vertex AI
courses.desc:
Vertex AI, AI Studio, Vertex API, model garden, custom model creation, ethical
                AI.

courses.name: Generative AI on GCP: Empowering ML Workflows with Vertex AI
courses.desc:
End-to-end ML workflows, model deployment, training, data prep, feature
                engineering.

courses.name: Generative AI on GCP: Building GenAI-powered Apps in GCP
courses.desc:
Build GenAI app: environment setup, TensorFlow, training loop, dockerization,
                model deployment.

phases.title: Bootcamp (Digital Skola / lainnya)
phases.meta: Setelah punya dasar + 1 project · bukan untuk pemula nol

courses.name: Cloud Engineer Bootcamp
courses.desc:
Bootcamp intensif untuk memperdalam cloud. Fokus ke project real, deployment,
                CI/CD, dan best practice industri.

platforms.title: Amazon Web Services (AWS)
platforms.description: Platform cloud terbesar di dunia · Ambil setelah selesai Google ACE

phases.title: AWS Dasar - Cloud Practitioner
phases.meta: Mulai sini · fondasi AWS untuk pemula

courses.name: CLF-C02: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner v1.1
courses.desc:
AWS cloud foundation - security, billing, architecture. Perfect untuk pemula yang
                belum pernah pakai AWS. Includes 18 Courses.

phases.title: AWS Associate - Pilih Spesialisasi
phases.meta: Setelah Cloud Practitioner selesai · pilih SATU jalur

courses.name: SAA-C03: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
courses.desc:
AWS architecture, deployment strategies, cloud services, data storage,
                networking, security, cost management. Jalur paling populer. Includes 16 Courses.

courses.name: DVA-C02: AWS Certified Developer - Associate v1.1
courses.desc:
Develop, deploy, debug cloud applications pakai AWS services dan CI/CD workflows.
                Cocok kalau background developer. Includes 23 Courses.

phases.title: AWS Professional - Level Lanjut
phases.meta: Setelah associate selesai · level tertinggi AWS

courses.name: SAP-C02: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Professional
courses.desc:
Advanced architecture, distributed systems, AWS best practices. Level paling
                tinggi di Solutions Architect. Includes 21 Courses.

courses.name: DOP-C02: AWS Certified DevOps Engineer - Professional
courses.desc:
Deployment automation, application management, SDLC optimization, pipeline
                development. Includes 20 Courses.

phases.title: AWS AI & Spesialisasi
phases.meta: Opsional · bisa diambil paralel atau setelah

courses.name: AIF-C01: AWS Certified AI Practitioner
courses.desc: ML basics, AI services, data preparation, model deployment. Includes 12 Courses.

courses.name: MLS-C01: AWS Certified Machine Learning - Specialty
courses.desc:
Model building, training, tuning, deployment, cloud-based ML implementation.
                Includes 18 Courses.

courses.name: Generative AI on AWS: Getting Started (Free)
courses.desc: AWS GenAI services, foundational models, infrastructure untuk GenAI solutions.

courses.name: Generative AI on AWS: Building GenAI Models with Amazon Bedrock (Free)
courses.desc:
Amazon Bedrock core concepts, model design, project evaluation, GenAI business
                applications.

courses.name: Generative AI on AWS: Building GenAI Models with Amazon SageMaker (Free)
courses.desc: GANs, VAEs, optimization, transfer learning, deployment, monitoring di SageMaker.

courses.name: Generative AI on AWS: Creating Intelligent Chatbots (Free)
courses.desc: Amazon Lex dan Polly, context-aware conversations, sentiment analysis.

courses.name: Generative AI on AWS: Generating Code with Amazon CodeWhisperer (Free)
courses.desc: Setup, automated code generation, software optimization, security configuration.

courses.name: Generative AI on AWS: Generating Speech with Amazon Polly (Free)
courses.desc:
Natural speech generation, voice customization, SSML, secure usage, cost
                optimization.

courses.name: Generative AI on AWS: Deploying & Managing GenAI Services on AWS (Free)
courses.desc:
AWS deployment services untuk GenAI. Data optimization, model training, security
                dengan SageMaker.

platforms.title: Microsoft Azure
platforms.description: Platform Microsoft · Sangat relevan untuk perusahaan enterprise & corporate

phases.title: Azure Fundamentals - Mulai Sini
phases.meta: Fondasi wajib sebelum semua Azure lainnya

courses.name: AZ-900: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals v1.1
courses.desc:
Azure cloud architecture, core services, compliance, governance, cost management.
                Mulai dari sini sebelum semua Azure lainnya. Includes 19 Courses.

courses.name: MS-900: Microsoft 365 Fundamentals v1.1
courses.desc:
Cloud services, productivity tools, security, compliance, collaboration features.
                Includes 10 Courses.

courses.name: DP-900: Microsoft Azure Data Fundamentals v1.1
courses.desc:
Cloud data services, analytics solutions, business intelligence, core data
                concepts. Includes 24 Courses.

courses.name: AI-900: Azure AI Fundamentals
courses.desc:
Azure Machine Learning, ML techniques, NLP workloads, conversational AI. Includes
                15 Courses.

phases.title: Azure Associate - Spesialisasi
phases.meta: Setelah fundamentals · pilih sesuai jalur karir

courses.name: AZ-104: Microsoft Azure Administrator
courses.desc:
Resource management, virtual networks, monitoring, backup solutions, cloud
                security. Cocok untuk cloud admin. Includes 20 Courses.

courses.name: AZ-204: Developing Solutions for Microsoft Azure
courses.desc:
Cloud app development, testing, maintenance, scalable solutions. Cocok untuk
                developer. Includes 30 Courses.

courses.name: AZ-700: Microsoft Certified Azure Network Engineer Associate
courses.desc:
Design, implement, manage Azure networking - hybrid connectivity, routing,
                network security. Includes 21 Courses.

courses.name: AZ-500: Microsoft Certified Azure Security Engineer Associate v1.1
courses.desc:
Security controls, identity management, cloud infrastructure security, threat
                response. Includes 12 Courses.

courses.name: DP-100: Designing and Implementing a Data Science Solution on Azure
courses.desc: Machine learning models dan data analytics di Azure. Includes 20 Courses.

phases.title: Azure Expert - Level Tertinggi
phases.meta: Setelah associate · butuh pengalaman nyata

courses.name: AZ-305: Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions
courses.desc:
Governance, security, data storage, business continuity solutions. Includes 18
                Courses.

courses.name: AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions
courses.desc:
CI/CD, automation, infrastructure as code, monitoring. Level advanced DevOps
                Azure. Includes 16 Courses.

phases.title: Azure AI & Bonus Gratis
phases.meta: Bisa diambil kapan aja · semua gratis

courses.name: Introduction to Generative AI on Azure
courses.desc:
Azure OpenAI, Bot, ML services. Chatbot creation, personalized marketing, model
                tuning.

courses.name: Generative AI with Azure OpenAI
courses.desc:
Models, practical uses, text answering, pricing, limitations, future Azure
                OpenAI.

courses.name: Deep Dive Into Generative AI with Azure OpenAI
courses.desc:
Architecture, OpenAI Studio, model customization, text & image generation,
                integration.

courses.name: Generative AI & the Azure Bot AI Service
courses.desc: Smart chatbots dengan GenAI dan Copilot Studio. CLU models, Cognitive Services.

platforms.title: Kubernetes
platforms.description: Container orchestration · Wajib untuk cloud engineer modern · Platform-agnostic

phases.title: Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) 2024
phases.meta: Ambil ini setelah paham salah satu cloud platform

courses.name: Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) 2024
courses.desc:
Manage, scale, deploy containerized workloads dengan Kubernetes di cloud-native
                environment. Sertifikasi paling dikenal untuk container orchestration. Includes 12 Courses.

phases.title: Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (CKAD)
phases.meta: Lanjutan CKA · fokus ke developer side

courses.name: Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (CKAD)
courses.desc:
Design, build, deploy cloud-native applications pakai Kubernetes primitives dan
                scalable microservice architecture. Includes 16 Courses.

platforms.title: Multi-Cloud, CompTIA & Lainnya
platforms.description: Security, cross-platform, Oracle · Ambil setelah minimal satu platform selesai

phases.title: Security - Cloud & Platform Agnostic
phases.meta: Untuk yang mau spesialisasi ke cloud security

courses.name: CLO-002: CompTIA Cloud Essentials+
courses.desc:
Cloud fundamentals, business impact, organizational implementation, adoption
                strategies. Includes 16 Courses.

courses.name: CV0-004: CompTIA Cloud+
courses.desc:
Cloud infrastructure management, configuration, deployment, troubleshooting.
                Includes 20 Courses.

courses.name: Certified Cloud Security Professional - CCSP
courses.desc:
Cloud architecture, data security, identity management, cloud compliance.
                Includes 22 Courses.

phases.title: Multi-Cloud & Cross-Platform
phases.meta: Setelah mahir satu platform · ekspansi ke semua cloud

courses.name: The Generative AI Cloud Odyssey: Exploring AWS, Azure, and GCP
courses.desc:
GenAI di semua 3 platform sekaligus - AWS, Azure, GCP. Hands-on projects.
                Includes 48 Courses!

phases.title: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)
phases.meta: Platform enterprise Oracle · niche tapi dicari perusahaan besar

courses.name: 1Z0-1085-25: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2025 Foundations Associate
courses.desc:
OCI foundation untuk tech & non-tech professionals baru ke OCI. Includes 21
                Courses.

courses.name: 1Z0-1072-25: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2025 Architect Associate
courses.desc:
IAM, Networking, Compute, Storage, secure scalable infrastructure, hands-on labs.
                Includes 23 Courses.

courses.name: 1Z0-1195-25: Oracle Data Platform 2025 Foundations Associate
courses.desc:
Autonomous Database, Data Lakehouse, Analytics, OCI data management. Includes 20
                Courses.

courses.name: 1Z0-1122-25: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2025 AI Foundations Associate
courses.desc: AI & ML fundamentals di OCI. Practical OCI AI concepts. Includes 23 Courses.

phases.title: CompTIA Cloud Essentials+ - Free Modules
phases.meta: Semua gratis · bisa diambil paralel kapan aja

courses.name: Essential Cloud Principles
courses.desc: Cloud essentials, deployment models, cloud infrastructure components.

courses.name: Essential Cloud Networking
courses.desc: Cloud migration strategies, VPC management, DMZ setup, SDN implementation.

courses.name: Security Considerations
courses.desc: IAM, single sign-on, multi-factor authentication, federated authentication.

courses.name: Cloud Storage Technologies
courses.desc: Cloud storage systems, hot/cold storage, data protection, replication, RAID.

courses.name: DevOps in the Cloud
courses.desc: DevOps best practices, CI/CD pipelines, automation untuk cloud deployment.

courses.name: Cloud Governance & Securing Data
courses.desc: Policy-based access control, data sovereignty, vulnerability assessment.

courses.name: Cloud Design Considerations
courses.desc:
High availability, disaster recovery strategies, benchmarking, failover
                scenarios.

courses.name: Cloud Native Apps & Cloud Data Analytics
courses.desc: Cloud-native architecture, containerization, microservices, big data management.

courses.name: Cloud Connectivity & Load Balancing
courses.desc: Load balancer architectures, disaster recovery strategies, resource utilization.

courses.name: Utilizing Cloud Services
courses.desc:
IoT, blockchain, VDI di cloud. Digital marketing, self-service cloud, cost
                management.

courses.name: Operations within Cloud
courses.desc: AWS services untuk data management, replication, storage, backup, autoscaling.

courses.name: Cloud Migration Strategies
courses.desc:
Migration types, best practices, hybrid cloud approaches untuk successful
                migration.

courses.name: Gap Analysis & Cloud Assessment
courses.desc: Cloud transformation stages, technology stack assessment, adoption strategies.

courses.name: Cloud Licensing Models & Risk Mitigation
courses.desc: Cloud pricing factors, risk mitigation strategies, compliance implementation.

courses.name: Contracting with Cloud Service Providers
courses.desc: Cloud costs, licensing models, contract negotiation strategies.

courses.name: Cloud Adoption to Enhance Business Value
courses.desc: Cloud SLAs, POC creation, cloud adoption planning untuk business value.

platforms.title: Latihan Praktik - Hands-On Labs
platforms.description: Deploy yang beneran · Bukan cuma nonton · Jadikan porto

praktikGrid.title: Google Cloud Labs
list: GCPBuat Cloud Storage bucket + upload file
GCPDeploy static site ke Cloud Storage + CDN
GCPCloud Run: deploy Python Flask app

praktikGrid.title: AWS Labs
praktikGrid.sub: Free tier 12 bulan · AWS Console + CLI

praktikGrid.title: Azure Labs
list: AZUREAzure App Service: deploy web app
AZUREAzure AD: setup user + role assignment

praktikGrid.title: Tools & DevOps Wajib
praktikGrid.sub: Kuasai ini dulu sebelum apply kerja
list: FREEDocker: build image + push ke registry
FREELinux CLI: ss, netstat, top, df, journalctl

praktikGrid.title: Project Portofolio
praktikGrid.sub: Build ini → taruh di GitHub → tulis di LinkedIn
list: PROJECTStatic site + CDN + custom domain di GCP
PROJECTServerless API: Lambda + API GW + DynamoDB
PROJECTCI/CD pipeline full: GitHub → Docker → Cloud
PROJECTInfrastructure as Code: semua pakai Terraform
PROJECTMulti-cloud: sama app, deploy di 3 platform
PROJECTBlog/portfolio site deploy pakai cloud native

milestones.title: Hello Cloud
milestones.desc: Udah punya akun GCP/AWS, bisa login console, tau billing, pernah buka Cloud Shell.

milestones.title: First Deploy
milestones.desc:
Udah pernah deploy sesuatu - VM, static site, atau function. Bisa akses hasilnya dari
                browser.

milestones.title: Container Ready
milestones.desc:
Udah bisa build Docker image, push ke registry, dan deploy container di cloud atau
                Kubernetes.

milestones.title: CI/CD Pipeline
milestones.desc:
Git push otomatis trigger build + deploy ke cloud. Pakai GitHub Actions atau cloud
                native pipeline.

milestones.title: IaC Ready
milestones.desc:
Infrastructure dituliskan sebagai kode (Terraform/Pulumi). Bisa destroy + recreate
                dalam menit.

milestones.title: Porto Siap Kerja
milestones.desc:
Minimal 3 project di GitHub + dokumentasi README. Monitoring jalan. Bisa explain ke
                interviewer.
